SQLLite.SQL: SELECT RD.REPORT_TYPE AS "ReportType", RD.REPORT_NUMBER AS "ReportNumber", RD.REPORT_DATE AS "ReportDate", RD.USER_ID AS "UserID", RD.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "CourtCode", RD.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "EnforcementCourtCode", RD.REPORT_TYPE || RD.REPORT_DATE || RD.USER_ID AS "Key" FROM REPORT_DATA RD WHERE RD.REPORT_TYPE != 'CVER' AND RD.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtId}

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper
